📊
TECNO KSA Store Visit Scorecard
v3 · Promoter + Non-Promoter + BA Dashboard
Ask your admin for the Apps Script URL, or click "Admin Guide" below to set up the backend.

Admin Setup Guide

Step 1: Create a new Google Sheet → copy the ID (between /d/ and /edit)
Step 2: Open script.google.com → New project → Paste code below → Replace SHEET_ID
Step 3: Deploy → New deployment → Web app / Execute as Me / Access: Anyone → Authorize → Copy URL
Step 4: Share URL with your team
TECNO KSA · Store Visit Scorecard v3
Synced Live Hui
0/55
/ 55 pts (→100)
📄 Draft:
⚡ Recent Stores
Non-Promoter Store Visit — Score covers display quality, brand visibility, stock, and in-store staff relationship. Score normalized to 100 for comparison.
Sections: X. Display (20) · Y. Brand Materials (12) · Z. Stock (8) · R. Staff Relationship (15)
X. Display & Product Visibility
0/20
TECNO products placed in visible high-traffic area (eye level / entrance)
Max 6 pts
0/6
Adequate shelf space — not squeezed or hidden by competitors
Max 4 pts
0/4
All displayed units powered on
Max 4 pts
0/4
Price tags present, accurate and legible
Max 6 pts
0/6
Y. Brand Materials & Identity
0/12
TECNO branding / signage visible at point of sale
Max 4 pts
0/4
POP/poster materials present and not damaged/expired
Max 4 pts
0/4
TECNO products not mixed with competitor shelf clutter
Max 4 pts
0/4
Z. Stock & Inventory
0/8
Minimum 2 SKU models displayed
Max 3 pts
0/3
Stock not empty / no out-of-stock on display
Max 3 pts
0/3
Pricing competitive vs nearby competitors (BA check)
Max 2 pts
0/2
R. Staff Relationship & TECNO Advocacy
0/15
BA has established rapport with store's own sales staff (greet by name, comfortable conversation)
Max 5 pts
0/5
Store's own sales staff proactively recommends TECNO when asked (willing advocacy)
Max 5 pts
0/5
Store staff can accurately state at least 2 TECNO product key specs
Max 5 pts
0/5
0
X/20
0
Y/12
0
Z/8
0
R/15
Critical — 0/100
Immediate action required
Raw 0/55 → Normalized 0/100
